notes: Authored by hand from the public Beyonic (now Onafriq) API docs. Covers the three POST endpoints the adaptor calls: /api/payments, /api/contacts and /api/collectionrequests. Request/response field names taken from the docs' example JSON payloads. Beyonic uses Token authentication (Authorization: Token <key>). Contact fields inferred from the contact object embedded in collection request responses since the dedicated contacts doc page was empty.
